text: Hello. Can you hear me? I'm Ethan from Nova Health Care Tennessee. The reason I'm reaching out to you is to let you know about a cashback benefit to help out-of-pocket costs of up to $10,000, especially when you're in a hospital. To make sure you qualify for this, please confirm with a yes or no if you are under the age of 65. I think I didn't hear that. Are you calling for add your message press 1 to mark your message urgent press 2 to mark your message private press 3 to send your message as is press pound. I'm sorry. I didn't quite get that. Are you still there? Confirm if you are under the age of 65. For add your message press 1 to mark your message urgent press 2 to mark your message private press 3 to send your message as is press pound. I think I didn't hear that. Are you under the age of 65? Are you still there? To review, rerecord or add to your message press 1 to mark your message urgent press 2 to mark your message private press 3 to send your message as is.
